classification.rule_hits: all deterministic rule hits are retained as evidence; terminal level uses the fixed priority

evidence.title_token_evidence: matched informative title tokens in normalized title order

frozen_sets.autoscholar_record160: existing frozen 162-case Record audit; 160 cases with at least one successful source are analyzed and 2 no-success cases remain explicit
frozen_sets.scifact: existing frozen SciFact 50-case Replay, classified independently with the same detector

identifier_matching.arxiv: normalized arXiv ID with token boundaries, including bare ID, arXiv prefix, abs/pdf URL and 10.48550/arXiv DOI forms
identifier_matching.doi: normalized DOI with token boundaries, including doi prefix and doi.org URL forms
identifier_matching.other_stable_ids: exact normalized value with field-specific prefix or official URL when present

interpretation.high_validity_risk: any direct identifier/title leakage affects at least 1 percent of queries, or any leakage level affects at least 5 percent of queries
interpretation.hit_concentration: descriptive only: compare leaked relation/query share among frozen matched results with its underlying share; no inferential significance claim
interpretation.low_validity_risk: all leakage affects less than 1 percent of queries
interpretation.moderate_validity_risk: between the low and high criteria
interpretation.non_leak_subset: diagnostic stratum reported beside full frozen results; never replaces the full result

query_and_title: unicode punctuation and underscore to spaces
